summary: Testing Sprint Visual UX improvements: MEJORA A (tarea activa badge) and MEJORA B (inventory filter bar). All 12 backend tests passed. All UI features verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing tarea activa (Test tarea multi-paso, 2/3 steps) and inventory (12 motos).
context_for_next_testing_agent: MEJORA A: TareaActivaBadge component in AgentChatPage.tsx polls /api/chat/tarea every 3s. Badge shows cyan (en_curso), yellow (pausada). Pausar/Continuar endpoints work. MEJORA B: InventarioAuteco.js has FILTER_STATES with 6 filters, default=Disponible. TODAS excludes Anulada client-side. All colors use inline style with exact hex values. Both features fully working.

test_results.MEJORA_A_badge_visible: PASS - Badge shows 'Test tarea multi-paso [2/3]' with cyan background
test_results.MEJORA_A_progress: PASS - Shows [2/3] progress and progress bar
test_results.MEJORA_A_ver_btn: PASS - Ver/Ocultar button toggles step list
test_results.MEJORA_A_pausar_btn: PASS - Pausar button visible when en_curso
test_results.MEJORA_A_pausar_action: PASS - Click Pausar changes badge to yellow, shows Continuar
test_results.MEJORA_A_continuar_action: PASS - Click Continuar resumes, badge back to cyan, Pausar reappears
test_results.MEJORA_B_6_filters: PASS - All 6 filters present with correct counts (TODAS:12, Disponible:1, Vendida:0, Entregada:10, Pendiente datos:1, Anulada:0)
test_results.MEJORA_B_default_disponible: PASS - Default active filter is Disponible with bg #15803d
test_results.MEJORA_B_todas_excludes_anulada: PASS - TODAS shows 12 motos (no Anuladas), states: {Disponible, Entregada, Pendiente datos}
test_results.MEJORA_B_estado_badges_inline: PASS - EstadoBadge uses inline style with exact hex colors
